mapper.sql: hs.id, hs.homework_id, hs.student_id, s.name as student_name, hs.class_id, c.class_name as class_name, hs.submit_content, hs.submit_time, hs.is_late, hs.grade_status, hs.score, hs.comment, hs.grader_id, u.real_name as grader_name, hs.grade_time, hs.create_time, hs.update_time, hs.is_deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM homework_submission hs LEFT JOIN student s ON hs.student_id = s.id LEFT JOIN class_entity c ON hs.class_id = c.id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON hs.grader_id = u.id WHERE hs.id = #{id} AND hs.is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO homework_submission ( homework_id, student_id, class_id, submit_content, submit_time, is_late, grade_status, create_time, update_time, is_deleted ) VALUES ( #{homeworkId}, #{studentId}, #{classId}, #{submitContent}, #{submitTime}, #{isLate}, 0, NOW(), NOW(), 0 )
mapper.update: UPDATE homework_submission SET score = #{score}, comment = #{comment}, grader_id = #{graderId}, grade_time = #{gradeTime}, grade_status = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0

update.foreach: UPDATE homework_submission SET score = #{item.score}, comment = #{item.comment}, grader_id = #{item.graderId}, grade_time = #{item.gradeTime}, grade_status = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{item.id} AND is_deleted = 0

mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) as totalCount, SUM(CASE WHEN grade_status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as submittedCount, SUM(CASE WHEN grade_status = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as notSubmittedCount, CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN grade_status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 2) ELSE 0 END as completionRate, SUM(CASE WHEN is_late = 0 AND grade_status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as onTimeCount, CASE WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN grade_status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 THEN ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN is_late = 0 AND grade_status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / SUM(CASE WHEN grade_status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 2) ELSE 0 END as onTimeRate, CASE WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN grade_status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 THEN ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN grade_status = 1 THEN score ELSE NULL END), 2) ELSE 0 END as avgScore FROM homework_submission WHERE homework_id = #{homeworkId} AND is_deleted = 0
